questions.question: Describe the main goals of a project in the context of big data analytics using Spark. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Define the objectives, scope, and deliverables of a project in big data analytics

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of data quality evaluation in a Spark project? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain how data quality evaluation helps ensure accurate and reliable results in big data analytics

questions.question: Compare and contrast a micro-project and a macro-project in the context of big data analytics using Spark. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the differences in scope, complexity, and objectives between micro- and macro-projects in big data analytics
